title: Test Selection Rules
description: Relationship data for test selection based on changed paths. Holds only relationships (which source paths couple to which test projects, which paths matter to everything or nothing, which standalone jobs a path fans out to). All selection policy lives in the TestSelector engine, not here.

ignore.description: Glob patterns for files that should be completely ignored (no test triggers, no fallback)

runEverything.description: Glob patterns for critical files - if any match, ALL tests run

testProjectPatterns.description: Patterns to identify test projects from affected project paths

mappings.description: Conventional source->test edge generators (the compact form for the component case). Each entry expands, via the optional {name} placeholder, into one or more build-typed edges.

edges.description: Explicit source->test edges for non-conventional couplings, tagged by type. Use a runtime edge for a coupling dotnet-affected cannot see (no ProjectReference).

packageOrArchiveProducingProjects.description: Glob patterns for projects that produce NuGet packages or archives but may not have IsPackable=true in a csproj (e.g. eng/clipack/**)

inferDeps.description: Per-test fact: does this test project trust the edges dotnet-affected infers from the build graph? Default true. Set a .csproj path to false to declare its inferred edges are false positives; it then runs only when a declared mappings/edges entry resolves to it. Replaces the old restrictedTestProjects list.

jobCategories.description: Boolean run_<name> gates for standalone jobs that do not flow through the affected_test_projects matrix (e.g. extension, polyglot). The reserved name 'integrations' is special: its boolean is derived from the selected test count, and its 'when' glob set doubles as the known-source-areas accounting net.

exclude.description: Glob patterns to exclude from matches

globOrGlobArray.description: A glob pattern, or an array of glob patterns.

mapping.description: A conventional source->test edge generator. Supports {name} capture-group substitution so one entry can cover a family of components.

from.description: Glob pattern(s) with optional {name} placeholder for source files.

to.description: Pattern with optional {name} placeholder for the test project path.

exclude.description: Glob patterns for paths to exclude from this mapping

edge.description: An explicit source->test edge for couplings the mapping convention can't express.

to.description: Repo-root-relative .csproj path of the test project this edge selects.

type.description: build (default; a coupling dotnet-affected can also see) or runtime (a coupling with no ProjectReference, invisible to the build graph).

category.description: Optional run_<category> label. The category boolean is derived from whether 'to' ends up in the selected test set, so it can never disagree with the matrix. Category edges must use a literal 'to' (no {name}).

exclude.description: Glob patterns for paths to exclude from this edge

jobCategory.description: A standalone job gate. 'when' declares the paths that fan out to the job; 'exclude' carves out paths that should not.

when.description: Glob pattern(s) that trigger this job category.

exclude.description: Glob patterns - matching files are excluded from triggering this category
